name: Big Bucket in the Sky Chicken 1
recipeIngredient: 2 packages (14 oz each) tomato soup OR Knorr Tomato with Basil Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the self-rising flour, tomato soup or Knorr Tomato with Basil Soup, paprika, salt, and Italian seasoning together.
2. Place the mixture in a large plastic bag and shake to combine thoroughly.
3. Coat chicken pieces evenly with the seasoned flour mixture.
4. Brush the butter over the coated chicken pieces.
5. Transfer the chicken to an oiled 10 x 13 baking dish.
6. Bake at 375°F for 20-40 minutes, or until juices run clear. Do not cook until dry.
(Note: SOURCE: PHIL DONAHUE SHOW)
